reviews.comment:
No cargue combustible...solo fui a descansar y tomar un café....atención excelente...buen precio... pero una salvedad para ocupar el baño hay que pedir la llave al que expende la nafta o en el frisoph....toda una complicación

(Translated by Google)
I didn't fill up with fuel... I just went to rest and have a coffee... excellent service... good price... but one caveat: to use the bathroom you have to ask the gas pump attendant or the convenience store clerk for the key... quite a hassle.
